controls.control_objective: To ensure have ramifications for a range of other risk categories too
controls.control_description:
If not managed effectively, credit risk may have ramifications for a range
of other risk categories too.

- Credit Risk Management) Directions, 2025.

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into effect immediately upon issuance
controls.control_description: These Directions shall come into effect immediately upon issuance.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to regional rural banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')

These Directions shall be applicable to Regional Rural Banks (hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank').
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to regional rural banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')

withdrawals are allowed any number of times depending upon the balance in the
account or up to a particular agreed amount and shall also be deemed to include
other deposit accounts which are neither Savings nor Term deposit account.

or RBI or a statutory body) of another commercial bank, or an AIFI, or a scheduled
cooperative bank, or a subsidiary of a commercial bank;

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply in cases where the authority to nominate a director arises exclusively from a lending or financing arrangement

nominate a director arises exclusively from a lending or financing arrangement.

controls.control_description:

of the fact that the Government has the common ownership or control of such entities.

(viig) 'Relative' with regard to a natural person shall have the same meaning as defined
in Section 2(77) of the Companies Act, 2013 and rules framed therein.]

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean a reserve created on the revaluation of assets or net assets represented by the surplus of the estimated replacement cost or estimated market val
controls.control_description:

or net assets represented by the surplus of the estimated replacement cost or
estimated market values over the book values thereof.

controls.control_description:

controls.control_description:

instalments or in bullet form.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean loans which have a specified maturity and is payable in instalments or in bullet form

controls.control_objective: To ensure only be reported under this head (term loans with maturity up to one year are to be reported under demand loans)
controls.control_description:
Term loans having maturity in excess of one year
shall only be reported under this head (term loans with maturity up to one year are
to be reported under demand loans).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to only be reported under this head (term loans with maturity up to one year are to be reported under demand loans)

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949, or the reserve bank of india act, 1934 and rules / regulat
controls.control_description:
(2) All other expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as have
been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, or the Reserve Bank of
India Act, 1934 and rules / regulations made thereunder, or any statutory modification or
re-enactment thereto or in other relevant regulations issued by the Reserve Bank, or
Glossary of Terms published by Reserve Bank or as used in commercial parlance, as the
case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949, or the reserve bank of india act, 1934 and rules / regulat

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a comprehensive board approved policy on credit risk management
controls.control_description:
5[A bank shall put in place a comprehensive Board approved policy on Credit Risk
Management.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place a comprehensive board approved policy on credit risk management

controls.control_objective: To ensure , inter alia, cover aspects related to lending to related parties, valuation of properties including empanelment of valuers and opening of current acc
controls.control_description:
The policy shall, inter alia, cover aspects related to lending to related
parties, valuation of properties including empanelment of valuers and opening of
current accounts and CC / OD accounts.

controls.control_objective: To ensure suitably factor in the possible impact of calamities on borrowers who may be impacted by such events
controls.control_description:
Credit assessments carried out by a bank shall suitably factor in the possible impact
of calamities on borrowers who may be impacted by such events.]
6 Inserted with effect from July 01, 2026 vide Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks - Credit Risk Management) Second Amendment Directions, 2026 dated April 29, 2026.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to suitably factor in the possible impact of calamities on borrowers who may be impacted by such events

controls.control_objective: To ensure from entering into any commitment for granting any loans or advances to or on behalf of any of its directors, or any firm in which any of its director
controls.control_description:
In terms of Section 20(1)(b) of the BR Act, 1949, a bank is prohibited from
entering into any commitment for granting any loans or advances to or on behalf
of any of its directors, or any firm in which any of its directors is interested as
partner, manager, employee or guarantor, or any company [not being a
subsidiary of the banking company or a company registered under Section 8 of
the Companies Act, 2013, or a Government company] of which, or the subsidiary
or the holding company of which any of the directors of the bank is a director,
managing agent, manager, employee or guarantor or in which he holds
substantial interest, or any individual in respect of whom any of its directors is a
partner or guarantor.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to from entering into any commitment for granting any loans or advances to or on behalf of any of its directors, or any firm in which any of its director

controls.control_objective: To ensure further renew such a facility on or after its contracted maturity or renewal date
controls.control_description:
<image>
Provided that, till the director relinquishes the directorship of either the bank or the
company, the bank shall not further renew such a facility on or after its contracted
maturity or renewal date;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to further renew such a facility on or after its contracted maturity or renewal date

controls.control_objective: To ensure be lower than the rate charged to the employees
controls.control_description:
The interest rate charged on all such loans shall not
be lower than the rate charged to the employees.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be lower than the rate charged to the employees

controls.control_objective: To ensure be fully secured by cash collateral of equivalent or higher value
controls.control_description:
(v) Non-Fund Based (NFB) facility on behalf of a director or his/her related party,
provided that all such facilities shall be fully secured by cash collateral of equivalent
or higher value.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be fully secured by cash collateral of equivalent or higher value

controls.control_objective: To ensure cash collateral would not be mandatory in exposures arising on account of derivative transactions
controls.control_description:
Provided that cash collateral would not be mandatory in exposures arising on
account of derivative transactions.]
9[B.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to cash collateral would not be mandatory in exposures arising on account of derivative transactions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be void and of no effect
controls.control_description:
In terms of Section 20A(2) of the Act ibid, any remission made in contravention of
the provisions of sub-section (1) above shall be void and of no effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be void and of no effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure be strictly observed
controls.control_description:
While granting loans and advances against shares, statutory provisions
contained in Sections 19(2) and 19(3) of the BR Act, 1949 shall be strictly
observed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be strictly observed

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide loans to companies for buy-back of shares / securities
controls.control_description:
Therefore, a bank shall
not provide loans to companies for buy-back of shares / securities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide loans to companies for buy-back of shares / securities

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the overall responsibility of ensuring that suitable mechanisms are put in place for implementation of the policy on lending to related parties b
controls.control_description:
The Board shall have the overall responsibility of ensuring that suitable mechanisms
are put in place for implementation of the policy on lending to related parties by the
bank.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to have the overall responsibility of ensuring that suitable mechanisms are put in place for implementation of the policy on lending to related parties b

controls.control_objective: To ensure contain specific provisions relating to 'lending to related parties' in accordance with the provisions of these directions
controls.control_description:
The credit policy (hereinafter called the policy) of a bank, as required in terms of the
extant directions, shall contain specific provisions relating to 'lending to related
parties' in accordance with the provisions of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to contain specific provisions relating to 'lending to related parties' in accordance with the provisions of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure prescribe, inter alia, additional safeguards to address the risks emanating from lending to related parties
controls.control_description:
The policy shall
prescribe, inter alia, additional safeguards to address the risks emanating from
lending to related parties.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prescribe, inter alia, additional safeguards to address the risks emanating from lending to related parties

controls.control_objective: To ensure also have specific provisions for lending to 'specified employees' of the bank and their relatives
controls.control_description:
The policy shall also have specific provisions for lending to 'specified employees' of
the bank and their relatives.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also have specific provisions for lending to 'specified employees' of the bank and their relatives

controls.control_objective: To ensure , as a part of the whistleblowing mechanism, encourage employees to communicate confidentially and without the risk of reprisal, legitimate concerns
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , as a part of the whistleblowing mechanism, encourage employees to communicate confidentially and without the risk of reprisal, legitimate concerns

controls.control_objective: To ensure specify aggregate limits for loans towards related parties
controls.control_description: 16F.The policy shall specify aggregate limits for loans towards related parties.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to specify aggregate limits for loans towards related parties

controls.control_objective: To ensure be sub-limits for loans to a single related party and a group of related parties
controls.control_description:
Within this
aggregate limit, there shall be sub-limits for loans to a single related party and a
group of related parties.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be sub-limits for loans to a single related party and a group of related parties

controls.control_objective: To ensure be within the extant prudential exposure limits prescribed by the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
These limits shall be within the extant prudential exposure
limits prescribed by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be within the extant prudential exposure limits prescribed by the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure also apply to grant of loans and advances to spouse and minor / dependent children of the directors of banks
controls.control_description:
Provisions of paragraph 7 in Chapter III shall also apply to grant of loans and
advances to spouse and minor / dependent children of the directors of banks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also apply to grant of loans and advances to spouse and minor / dependent children of the directors of banks

controls.control_objective: To ensure grant loan or advance to or on behalf of spouses of their directors in cases where the spouse has his / her own independent source of income arising o
controls.control_description:
However, banks may grant loan or advance to or on behalf of spouses of their
directors in cases where the spouse has his / her own independent source of
income arising out of his / her employment or profession and the facility so granted
is based on standard procedures and norms for assessing the creditworthiness of
the borrower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to grant loan or advance to or on behalf of spouses of their directors in cases where the spouse has his / her own independent source of income arising o

controls.control_objective: To ensure be extended on commercial terms, conforming to arms-length principle
controls.control_description:
Such facility should be extended on commercial terms, conforming
to arms-length principle.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be extended on commercial terms, conforming to arms-length principle

controls.control_objective: To ensure be higher than the following ceilings: asset size of the bank in ₹ crore materiality threshold ceilings > 50,000 ₹50 lakh ≥ 10,000 to up to 50,000 ₹25
controls.control_description:
Loans to related parties, which are not prohibited in terms of provisions of Chapter
III or this Chapter of these Directions, or which have been permitted under power
exercised by the Reserve Bank under clause (a) of the Explanation under sub-
section 4 of Section 20 of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, except (i) credit
facilities fully secured by cash or liquid securities and in accordance to prescribed
LTV and valuation norms for such securities, and (ii) interbank loans, shall be
subject to a materiality threshold as per the credit policy, which shall not be higher
than the following ceilings:
Asset Size of the bank in ₹ crore Materiality Threshold Ceilings
> 50,000 ₹50 lakh
≥ 10,000 to up to 50,000 ₹25 lakh
Up to 10,000 ₹10 lakh
Asset size based on the last audited balance sheet.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be higher than the following ceilings: asset size of the bank in ₹ crore materiality threshold ceilings > 50,000 ₹50 lakh ≥ 10,000 to up to 50,000 ₹25

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply at individual transaction level
controls.control_description: For loans, materiality threshold shall apply at individual transaction level.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply at individual transaction level

controls.control_objective: To ensure vary for different categories of loans to related parties as per the bank's policy
controls.control_description:
Materiality thresholds may vary for different categories of loans to related parties as
per the bank's policy.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to vary for different categories of loans to related parties as per the bank's policy

controls.control_objective: To ensure be sanctioned either by the board or by the 'committee on lending to related parties' of the bank
controls.control_description:
All loans above the prescribed materiality threshold shall be sanctioned either by the
Board or by the 'Committee on Lending to Related Parties' of the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be sanctioned either by the board or by the 'committee on lending to related parties' of the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure recuse themselves from deliberations and decision on loan proposals, or contracts and arrangements, involving themselves or their related parties
controls.control_description:
Directors, KMP, or 'specified employees' shall recuse themselves from deliberations
and decision on loan proposals, or contracts and arrangements, involving
themselves or their related parties.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to recuse themselves from deliberations and decision on loan proposals, or contracts and arrangements, involving themselves or their related parties

controls.control_objective: To ensure also extend to deliberations and decisions relating to any subsequent material changes to the terms of such loans, including one-time settlements, wri
controls.control_description:
Such recusal shall also extend to deliberations
and decisions relating to any subsequent material changes to the terms of such
loans, including one-time settlements, write-offs, waivers, enforcement of security,
implementation of resolution plans, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also extend to deliberations and decisions relating to any subsequent material changes to the terms of such loans, including one-time settlements, wri

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a suitable mechanism for maintaining and periodically updating the list of all the related persons, and the related parties thereof, as w
controls.control_description:
A bank shall put in place a suitable mechanism for maintaining and periodically
updating the list of all the related persons, and the related parties thereof, as well
as the loans sanctioned by the bank to such related persons and related parties.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place a suitable mechanism for maintaining and periodically updating the list of all the related persons, and the related parties thereof, as w

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported to the board on an annual basis
controls.control_description:
Credit facilities sanctioned to 'specified employees' and their relatives shall be
reported to the Board on an annual basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported to the board on an annual basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be conducted at quarterly or shorter intervals by internal auditors to check, inter alia, whether guidelines and procedures in relation to loans to re
controls.control_description:
Periodic reviews shall be conducted at quarterly or shorter intervals by internal
auditors to check, inter alia, whether guidelines and procedures in relation to loans
to related parties are being adhered to or not.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be conducted at quarterly or shorter intervals by internal auditors to check, inter alia, whether guidelines and procedures in relation to loans to re

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported to the audit committee of the board
controls.control_description:
Any deviation from the policy relating to lending to related parties and reasons
therefor such deviations shall be reported to the Audit Committee of the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported to the audit committee of the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure always be treated as lending to related party
controls.control_description:
Any product, entity or structure formed with the objective of circumventing these
Directions through various means, such as reciprocal lending or quid pro quo
arrangements, and identified as such by the auditors of the bank or by the
supervisory authority and investigating agencies shall always be treated as lending
to related party.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to always be treated as lending to related party

controls.control_objective: To ensure result in supervisory and enforcement actions as deemed appropriate by the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
Any non-compliance with and circumvention of these Directions shall result in
supervisory and enforcement actions as deemed appropriate by the Reserve
Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to result in supervisory and enforcement actions as deemed appropriate by the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure include imposition of monetary penalty, requirement of full provisioning, directions to conduct staff accountability exercises, forensic <image> audit
controls.control_description:
These actions may include imposition of monetary penalty, requirement of
full provisioning, directions to conduct staff accountability exercises, forensic
<image>
audits, and restrictions or any other supervisory and enforcement actions as
deemed fit.]
<image>
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include imposition of monetary penalty, requirement of full provisioning, directions to conduct staff accountability exercises, forensic <image> audit

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by the following aspects while formulating a policy on valuation of properties and appointment of valuers:
controls.control_description:
A bank shall be guided by the following aspects while formulating a policy on valuation
of properties and appointment of valuers:
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be guided by the following aspects while formulating a policy on valuation of properties and appointment of valuers:

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a board approved policy in place for valuation of properties including collaterals accepted for their exposures
controls.control_description:
Policy for valuation of properties
(1) A bank shall have a Board approved policy in place for valuation of properties
including collaterals accepted for their exposures.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to have a board approved policy in place for valuation of properties including collaterals accepted for their exposures

controls.control_objective: To ensure be done by professionally qualified independent valuers i
controls.control_description: (2) The valuation shall be done by professionally qualified independent valuers i.e.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be done by professionally qualified independent valuers i

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a direct or indirect interest
controls.control_description:
the
valuer shall not have a direct or indirect interest.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a direct or indirect interest

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain minimum two independent valuation reports for properties valued at ₹50 crore or above
controls.control_description:
(3) A bank shall obtain minimum two Independent Valuation Reports for properties
valued at ₹50 crore or above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain minimum two independent valuation reports for properties valued at ₹50 crore or above

controls.control_objective: To ensure keep the following aspects in view while formulating policy for revaluation of their own properties: 1) as a bank is permitted to include revaluation
controls.control_description:
Revaluation of bank's own properties
In addition to the above, a bank may keep the following aspects in view while
formulating policy for revaluation of their own properties:
1) As a bank is permitted to include revaluation reserves as part of Capital in terms
of Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks - Prudential Norms on Capital
Adequacy) Directions, 2025, it is necessary that revaluation reserves represent
true appreciation in the market value of the properties and banks have in place a
comprehensive policy for revaluation of fixed assets owned by them.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to keep the following aspects in view while formulating policy for revaluation of their own properties: 1) as a bank is permitted to include revaluation

controls.control_objective: To ensure inter alia cover procedure for identification of assets for revaluation, maintenance of separate set of records for such assets, the frequency of reva
controls.control_description:
Such a policy
shall inter alia cover procedure for identification of assets for revaluation,
maintenance of separate set of records for such assets, the frequency of
revaluation, depreciation policy for such assets, policy for sale of such revalued
assets etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to inter alia cover procedure for identification of assets for revaluation, maintenance of separate set of records for such assets, the frequency of reva

controls.control_objective: To ensure reflect the change in the fair value of the fixed asset, the frequency of revaluation shall be determined based on the observed volatility in the pric
controls.control_description:
As the revaluation shall reflect the change in the fair value of the fixed asset, the
frequency of revaluation shall be determined based on the observed volatility in the
prices of the assets in the past.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to reflect the change in the fair value of the fixed asset, the frequency of revaluation shall be determined based on the observed volatility in the pric

controls.control_objective: To ensure reflect the change in the expected pattern of consumption of the future economic benefits of the assets
controls.control_description:
Further, any change in the method of depreciation
shall reflect the change in the expected pattern of consumption of the future economic
benefits of the assets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to reflect the change in the expected pattern of consumption of the future economic benefits of the assets

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to these principles meticulously while changing the frequency of revaluation / method of depreciation for a particular class of assets
controls.control_description:
A bank shall adhere to these principles meticulously while
changing the frequency of revaluation / method of depreciation for a particular class
of assets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to these principles meticulously while changing the frequency of revaluation / method of depreciation for a particular class of assets

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a procedure for empanelment of professional valuers and maintain a register / record of 'approved list of valuers'
controls.control_description:
Policy for Empanelment of Independent valuers
1) A bank shall have a procedure for empanelment of professional valuers and
maintain a register / record of 'approved list of valuers'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a procedure for empanelment of professional valuers and maintain a register / record of 'approved list of valuers'

controls.control_objective: To ensure prescribe a minimum qualification for empanelment of valuers
controls.control_description: 2) A bank may prescribe a minimum qualification for empanelment of valuers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prescribe a minimum qualification for empanelment of valuers

controls.control_objective: To ensure be prescribed for different classes of assets (e
controls.control_description: Different qualifications may be prescribed for different classes of assets (e.g.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be prescribed for different classes of assets (e

controls.control_objective: To ensure take into consideration the qualifications prescribed under section 34ab (rule 8a) of the wealth tax act, 1957
controls.control_description:
While prescribing the
qualification, the bank shall take into consideration the qualifications prescribed
under Section 34AB (Rule 8A) of the Wealth Tax Act, 1957.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take into consideration the qualifications prescribed under section 34ab (rule 8a) of the wealth tax act, 1957

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be guided by the relevant accounting standard issued by the institute of chartered accountants of india
controls.control_description:
A bank shall also be guided by the relevant Accounting Standard issued by the
Institute of Chartered Accountants of India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be guided by the relevant accounting standard issued by the institute of chartered accountants of india

controls.control_objective: To ensure be available for search by any lender or any other person desirous of dealing with the property
controls.control_description:
The records
maintained by the Central Registry shall be available for search by any lender or any
other person desirous of dealing with the property.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be available for search by any lender or any other person desirous of dealing with the property

controls.control_objective: To ensure be noted that under the provisions of section 23 of the sarfaesi act, every transaction of security interest is required to be filed with the registry
controls.control_description:
It may be noted that under the provisions of Section 23 of the SARFAESI
Act, every transaction of security interest is required to be filed with the Registry.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be noted that under the provisions of section 23 of the sarfaesi act, every transaction of security interest is required to be filed with the registry

controls.control_objective: To ensure all be used as transaction accounts by the customers, which raises concerns relating to credit monitoring by the lenders
controls.control_description:
Current Accounts, Cash Credit Accounts (CC), and Overdraft Accounts (OD) may
all be used as transaction accounts by the customers, which raises concerns relating
to credit monitoring by the lenders.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to all be used as transaction accounts by the customers, which raises concerns relating to credit monitoring by the lenders

controls.control_objective: To ensure include commercial banks (including small finance banks, local area banks, and regional rural banks, but excluding payments banks), urban co-operative
controls.control_description:
Explanation (1): 'Banking System' for the purpose of this Chapter shall include
Commercial Banks (including Small Finance Banks, Local Area Banks, and Regional
Rural Banks, but excluding Payments Banks), Urban Co-operative Banks and Rural
Co-operative Banks (State Co-operative Banks and Central Co-operative Banks).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include commercial banks (including small finance banks, local area banks, and regional rural banks, but excluding payments banks), urban co-operative

controls.control_objective: To ensure the sum of all sanctioned fund-based credit facilities and non-fund-based facilities availed by the borrower from the banking system
controls.control_description:
Explanation (2): 'Exposure' for the purpose of this Chapter means the sum of all
sanctioned fund-based credit facilities and non-fund-based facilities availed by the
borrower from the banking system.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the sum of all sanctioned fund-based credit facilities and non-fund-based facilities availed by the borrower from the banking system

controls.control_objective: To ensure a current account or od account used primarily for receipts of cash inflows of the accountholder
controls.control_description:
Explanation: 'Collection Account' for the purpose of this Chapter means a current
account or OD account used primarily for receipts of cash inflows of the
accountholder.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a current account or od account used primarily for receipts of cash inflows of the accountholder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the conditions outlined in paragraph 39f of these directions
controls.control_description:
Restricted payments / cash outflows from such account shall be
subject to the conditions outlined in paragraph 39F of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to the conditions outlined in paragraph 39f of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide such cash credit facilities as per the needs of the customer, without any restriction under this chapter
controls.control_description:
A bank may provide such cash credit facilities as per the needs of the
customer, without any restriction under this Chapter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide such cash credit facilities as per the needs of the customer, without any restriction under this chapter

controls.control_objective: To ensure maintain current account or od account without any restriction in cases where the aggregate exposure of the banking system to the customer is less tha
controls.control_description:
A bank may maintain current account or OD account without any restriction in
cases where the aggregate exposure of the banking system to the customer is less
than ₹10 crore.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to maintain current account or od account without any restriction in cases where the aggregate exposure of the banking system to the customer is less tha

controls.control_objective: To ensure be remitted within two working days of receipt of such funds to a cc account, current account, or od account maintained with any bank in the banking s
controls.control_description:
Funds credited into a collection account shall be remitted within two working days
of receipt of such funds to a CC account, current account, or OD account maintained
with any bank in the banking system and designated by the borrower for this purpose
(hereinafter referred to as 'designated account' in this Chapter).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be remitted within two working days of receipt of such funds to a cc account, current account, or od account maintained with any bank in the banking s

controls.control_objective: To ensure be through the designated account only
controls.control_description:
Any disbursement of
overdraft limit from an OD account, which is in the nature of a collection account, shall
be through the designated account only.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be through the designated account only

controls.control_objective: To ensure statutory dues such as taxes, and dues
controls.control_description:
Provided that statutory dues such as taxes, and dues, if any, to the bank maintaining
the collection account may be debited before remitting the funds.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to statutory dues such as taxes, and dues

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to the accounts mentioned below: (1) accounts opened as per the provisions of foreign exchange management act, 1999 (fema) and notificat
controls.control_description:
The restrictions placed in terms of paragraph 39D(1) of these Directions shall not
be applicable to the accounts mentioned below:
(1) Accounts opened as per the provisions of Foreign Exchange Management Act,
1999 (FEMA) and notifications issued thereunder, including accounts mandated
for ensuring compliance under the FEMA framework.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to the accounts mentioned below: (1) accounts opened as per the provisions of foreign exchange management act, 1999 (fema) and notificat

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that transactions in such accounts are used only for the permitted /
controls.control_description:
Provided that banks operating the above-mentioned exempted accounts shall
ensure that transactions in such accounts are used only for the permitted /
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that transactions in such accounts are used only for the permitted /

controls.control_objective: To ensure monitor accounts maintained with them on a regular basis, and in any case at least once every half-year
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of ensuring ongoing compliance with this Chapter, all banks shall
monitor accounts maintained with them on a regular basis, and in any case at least
once every half-year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to monitor accounts maintained with them on a regular basis, and in any case at least once every half-year

controls.control_objective: To ensure notify the customer(s) concerned promptly, and in any case within one month from the date of observing such ineligibility, that the account must eithe
controls.control_description:
then the bank shall notify the customer(s) concerned promptly, and in any case within
one month from the date of observing such ineligibility, that the account must either
be converted to a collection account or closed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to notify the customer(s) concerned promptly, and in any case within one month from the date of observing such ineligibility, that the account must eithe

controls.control_objective: To ensure be completed within three months of observing such ineligibility
controls.control_description:
The conversion or closure process, as
the case may be, shall be completed within three months of observing such
ineligibility.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be completed within three months of observing such ineligibility

controls.control_objective: To ensure be appropriately flagged in the bank's core banking solution (cbs) to ensure clear identification and to facilitate effective monitoring
controls.control_description:
Accounts opened in terms of these Directions shall be appropriately flagged in the
bank's core banking solution (CBS) to ensure clear identification and to facilitate
effective monitoring.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be appropriately flagged in the bank's core banking solution (cbs) to ensure clear identification and to facilitate effective monitoring

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that such accounts and transactions and cashflows therein are monitored at the borrower level as also at the account level
controls.control_description:
Banks maintaining multiple accounts for a borrower shall ensure
that such accounts and transactions and cashflows therein are monitored at the
borrower level as also at the account level.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that such accounts and transactions and cashflows therein are monitored at the borrower level as also at the account level

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that an accountholder utilise their account solely for transactions related to their authorised business or activities
controls.control_description:
A bank shall ensure that an accountholder utilise their account solely for
transactions related to their authorised business or activities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that an accountholder utilise their account solely for transactions related to their authorised business or activities

controls.control_objective: To ensure not, under any circumstances, be used as pass-through channels for facilitating third- party transactions
controls.control_description:
These accounts shall
not, under any circumstances, be used as pass-through channels for facilitating third-
party transactions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to not, under any circumstances, be used as pass-through channels for facilitating third- party transactions

controls.control_objective: To ensure entities expressly licensed or authorised by a financial sector regulator to facilitate third-party transactions may continue to do so
controls.control_description:
<image>
Provided that entities expressly licensed or authorised by a financial sector regulator
to facilitate third-party transactions may continue to do so.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to entities expressly licensed or authorised by a financial sector regulator to facilitate third-party transactions may continue to do so

controls.control_objective: To ensure strictly be limited to the specific transactions they are authorised to do and shall not extend beyond that scope
controls.control_description:
However, such activities
shall strictly be limited to the specific transactions they are authorised to do and shall
not extend beyond that scope.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to strictly be limited to the specific transactions they are authorised to do and shall not extend beyond that scope

controls.control_objective: To ensure be appropriately flagged in the bank's cbs to ensure clear identification and to facilitate effective monitoring
controls.control_description:
Any account that has been permitted to carry out such
third-party transactions shall be appropriately flagged in the bank's CBS to ensure
clear identification and to facilitate effective monitoring.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be appropriately flagged in the bank's cbs to ensure clear identification and to facilitate effective monitoring

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that an accountholder, who is not licensed or authorised by the reserve bank to accept deposits or to provide payment services, do not engage i
controls.control_description:
A bank shall ensure that an accountholder, who is not licensed or authorised by
the Reserve Bank to accept deposits or to provide payment services, do not engage
in such activities through accounts maintained with them.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that an accountholder, who is not licensed or authorised by the reserve bank to accept deposits or to provide payment services, do not engage i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be implemented to detect the above prohibited usage, including mechanisms to flag accounts exhibiting unusually high transaction volumes, frequent pas
controls.control_description:
Robust monitoring systems shall be implemented to detect the above prohibited
usage, including mechanisms to flag accounts exhibiting unusually high transaction
volumes, frequent pass-through activities, or inconsistencies between the
accountholder's stated line of business and transactions carried out through the
account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be implemented to detect the above prohibited usage, including mechanisms to flag accounts exhibiting unusually high transaction volumes, frequent pas

controls.control_objective: To ensure preferably be remitted directly to the intended beneficiary's account(s) or for the specified end-use
controls.control_description:
Term loans sanctioned by the bank shall preferably be remitted directly to the
intended beneficiary's account(s) or for the specified end-use, where such beneficiary
is identifiable, rather than routing the funds through the borrower's account.]
<image>
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to preferably be remitted directly to the intended beneficiary's account(s) or for the specified end-use

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as under: (1) minimum level of 'loan component' in respect of borrowers having aggregate fund based working capital limit (wcl), excluding intra-da
controls.control_description:
With a view to enhance credit discipline among the larger borrowers enjoying working
capital facility from the banking system, delivery of bank credit for such borrowers
shall be as under:
(1) Minimum level of 'loan component'
In respect of borrowers having aggregate fund based working capital limit (WCL),
excluding intra-day credit facilities, of ₹150 crore and above from the banking system,
the outstanding 'loan component' (Working Capital Loan) must be equal to at least
60 per cent of the sanctioned fund based working capital limit, including ad hoc limits
and TODs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be as under: (1) minimum level of 'loan component' in respect of borrowers having aggregate fund based working capital limit (wcl), excluding intra-da

controls.control_objective: To ensure only be allowed from the 'loan component'
controls.control_description:
Hence, for such borrowers, drawings up to 60 per cent of the total fund
based working capital limits shall only be allowed from the 'loan component'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to only be allowed from the 'loan component'

controls.control_objective: To ensure be allowed in the form of cash credit / overdraft facility
controls.control_description:
Drawings in excess of the minimum 'loan component' threshold may be allowed in
the form of cash credit / overdraft facility.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be allowed in the form of cash credit / overdraft facility

controls.control_objective: To ensure be effected after excluding the export credit limits (pre-shipment and post-shipment) and bills limit for inland sales from the working capital limit
controls.control_description:
The bifurcation of the working capital limit
into loan and cash credit / overdraft components shall be effected after excluding the
export credit limits (pre-shipment and post-shipment) and bills limit for inland sales
from the working capital limit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be effected after excluding the export credit limits (pre-shipment and post-shipment) and bills limit for inland sales from the working capital limit

controls.control_objective: To ensure form part of the loan component
controls.control_description:
Investment by the bank in the commercial papers issued
by the borrower shall form part of the loan component, provided the investment is
sanctioned as part of the working capital limit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to form part of the loan component

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable on the following:
controls.control_description:
The above instructions on minimum loan component shall not be applicable on the
following:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable on the following:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be maintained at individual bank level in all cases, including consortium lending
controls.control_description:
(2) Sharing of Working Capital Finance
Bifurcation of working capital facility into loan component and cash credit / overdraft
component shall be maintained at individual bank level in all cases, including
consortium lending.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be maintained at individual bank level in all cases, including consortium lending

controls.control_objective: To ensure be fixed by banks in consultation with the borrowers
controls.control_description:
<image>
(3) Amount and tenor of the loan
The amount and tenor of the loan component may be fixed by banks in consultation
with the borrowers, subject to the tenor being not less than seven days.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be fixed by banks in consultation with the borrowers

controls.control_objective: To ensure decide to split the loan component into wcls with different maturity periods as per the needs of the borrowers
controls.control_description:
Banks may
decide to split the loan component into WCLs with different maturity periods as per
the needs of the borrowers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to decide to split the loan component into wcls with different maturity periods as per the needs of the borrowers

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the discretion to stipulate repayment of the wcls in instalments or by way of a 'bullet' repayment
controls.control_description:
(4) Repayment / Renewal / Rollover of Loan Component
Banks / consortia / syndicates shall have the discretion to stipulate repayment of the
WCLs in instalments or by way of a 'bullet' repayment, subject to Reserve Bank of
India (Regional Rural Banks - Income Recognition, Asset Classification and
Provisioning) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the discretion to stipulate repayment of the wcls in instalments or by way of a 'bullet' repayment

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider rollover of the wcls at the request of the borrower
controls.control_description:
A bank may consider rollover of the WCLs at the
request of the borrower, subject to compliance with the directions ibid.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider rollover of the wcls at the request of the borrower

controls.control_objective: To ensure refer to reserve bank of india (regional rural banks - prudential norms on capital adequacy) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
v) For risk weights credit conversion factor for undrawn portion of working capital
limits sanctioned to the aforesaid large borrowers, banks shall refer to Reserve Bank
of India (Regional Rural Banks - Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Directions,
2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to refer to reserve bank of india (regional rural banks - prudential norms on capital adequacy) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure extend any financial assistance (including working capital funds) to nbfcs
controls.control_description:
A bank shall not extend any financial assistance (including working capital funds) to
NBFCs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to extend any financial assistance (including working capital funds) to nbfcs

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The Directions, instructions and
guidelines already repealed shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken, or
initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to
be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted
under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may
be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being
in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the Reserve Bank may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any
provision of these Directions given by the Reserve Bank shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding
